x-enumeration-literals.name: SocialSecurityNumber
x-enumeration-literals.description: Number assigned by an authority to identify the social security number of a person.

x-enumeration-literals.name: DriversLicenseNumber
x-enumeration-literals.description: Number assigned by an authority to identify a driver's license.

x-enumeration-literals.name: PassportNumber
x-enumeration-literals.description: Number assigned by an authority to identify the passport number of a person.

x-enumeration-literals.name: IdentityCardNumber
x-enumeration-literals.description: Number assigned by a national authority to an identity card. (ISO20022)

x-enumeration-literals.name: EmployerIdentificationNumber
x-enumeration-literals.description: Number assigned to an employer by a registration authority. (ISO20022)

x-enumeration-literals.name: AlienRegistrationNumber
x-enumeration-literals.description: Number assigned by a social security agency to identify a non-resident person.

x-enumeration-literals.name: CustomerIdentificationNumber
x-enumeration-literals.description: Number assigned by an issuer to identify a customer.

x-enumeration-literals.name: EmployeeIdentificationNumber
x-enumeration-literals.description: Number assigned by a registration authority to an employee.

x-enumeration-literals.name: NationalIdentityNumber
x-enumeration-literals.description: Number assigned by an authority to identify the national identity number of a person.

x-enumeration-literals.name: TelephoneNumber
x-enumeration-literals.description: Number assigned by a telephone or mobile phone operator to identify a person. A person may have multiple phone numbers.

x-enumeration-literals.name: TaxIdentificationNumber
x-enumeration-literals.description: Number assigned by a tax authority to identify a person.
